The '''Zeer''' were a species of [[Wikipedia:Giraffe|giraffe]]-like, [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] creatures.

==Biology and appearance==
[[File:Zeer2.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Two zeer at the [[Coruscant Livestock Exchange and Exhibition|Coruscant Livestock Exchange]].]]

Zeer traveled in herds, and ate leaves off the very top of tall trees. They were used to populate [[Ohma-D'un/Legends|Ohma-D'un]] and in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] era were displayed for trade on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Zeer were relatively calm creatures that inhabited most of northern temperate and subtropical [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. They had two swiveling horns on their heads which were similar to that of a [[Dwarf bantha/Legends|dwarf bantha]].

==History==
Before the years of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]], illegal poachers invaded [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. They killed many of these great beasts, and greatly diminished their population. However, during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], their population began growing once again.
